pattern: Summing overlapping fixed-length intervals reduces to clamping each gap between consecutive starts by the effect duration.
hints: Each attack would add a fixed span, but an attack arriving early cuts the previous span short.
Walk consecutive attack times: the contribution of each is the smaller of the duration and the gap to the next attack.
Add the gap (next start minus current start) capped at duration for every attack except the last, then add a full duration for the final attack.

edge_inputs.description: second attack resets before first ends
all attacks at the same instant
back-to-back attacks each contribute exactly one second of overlap save
gaps larger than duration never overlap

stress.description: many strictly increasing attack times with random gaps
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, size)
    t = rng.randrange(0, 100)
    series = []
    for _ in range(n):
        series.append(t)
        t += rng.randrange(0, 10)
        if t > 10000000:
            t = 10000000
    duration = rng.randrange(0, 50)
    return [series, duration]
stress.note: non-decreasing series within bounds; small gaps create overlaps
